description: Announcement celebrating giveaway winners with congratulatory messaging and gratitude to participants, creating excitement and community goodwill around contest outcomes.
structural_recipe: Open with celebratory Arabic phrase (جهزوا/Prepare yourselves), congratulate winners using 'الف مبروك' (congratulations), reference the specific prize or contest name with hashtags, include emojis in brand colors, thank all participants for engagement, close with positive sentiment. Use a mix of formal and conversational tone in Arabic.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value community inclusion and fairness in contests. Announcing winners publicly builds trust, celebrates participant luck (حالفهم الحظ), and acknowledges collective effort. This drives engagement through FOMO satisfaction for winners and encourages future participation from non-winners seeking similar recognition.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure winner selection is genuinely fair and transparent to maintain credibility in Saudi market
Use culturally appropriate congratulatory phrases (الف مبروك is standard)
Include specific prize details and contest name to enhance authenticity
Avoid implying any luck-based gambling connotations; frame as community appreciation contest
cultural_constraints: Avoid any religious sensitivity in contest mechanics
Ensure inclusivity messaging respects all participant backgrounds
